name: Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: salt and black pepper to taste
8 to 10 tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped (up to 8)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in oil until soft.
2. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add tomatoes, salt, and pepper; bring to a boil.
4. Stir in sugar; simmer over low heat for 1 hour, stirring occasionally and adding very little water if needed.
5. Stir in oregano and basil once off the heat.
